# Dylan Teugels

> Technical Lead & Software Developer at PHPro (Belgium). 5+ years building scalable Adobe Commerce B2C/B2B platforms for enterprise merchants. Hyvä early adopter since 2021.

## Canonical sources
- Portfolio: /
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dylan-teugels-942a82159/
- GitHub: https://github.com/DylanTeugels-r0663682

## About
Curiosity-driven full-stack developer. Pragmatic, independent, calm under pressure. Works remote-friendly from Belgium.

## Core expertise
- Adobe Commerce / Magento 2 (Adobe Commerce Certified Developer)
- Hyvä + Hyvä Checkout (Hyvä Certified, early adopter 2021)
- PHP, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS
- Enterprise integrations: SAP, Salesforce, Akeneo PIM, Algolia (middleware-first)
- Microservices decomposition from Magento monolith
- B2B commerce: company admin, role-based permissions, price lists
- Multi-store / multi-currency / international storefronts

## Reference project
Orac Decor "One Site" program — merging B2C and B2B into a single multi-currency, multi-country Adobe Commerce installation with Hyvä. Technical Lead, named on project charter.

## Contact
- Email: dylan.teugels9@gmail.com
- Languages: Dutch (native), English (good), French (medium)
